category_sources: source_facts.description says universal model serving implementation; official GitHub README describes DJL Serving as a universal stand-alone model serving solution.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses DJL Serving; source_facts.name is djl-serving.
docs_sources: Official docs.djl.ai navigation has a DJL Serving section with starting, inference, configuration, architecture, and HTTP API pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository https://github.com/deepjavalibrary/djl-serving; official README identifies the project as DJL Serving.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes serving models through HTTP endpoints, supported ML frameworks, performance, auto-scaling, and plugin extensibility.
